Car.MetaTag: Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Tech GT Euro 5 (s/s) 4dr Diesel Manual Grey
Car.Description: - Available now is this sleek and well-presented 2014 (64) Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Tech GT, a stylish executive coupe-saloon offering strong performance, excellent comfort, and impressive fuel economy. - Powered by the refined 2.0 TDI diesel engine, it delivers smooth power, strong torque, and great MPG — perfect for motorway driving, commuting, or anyone wanting executive comfort with sporty styling. - ✅ GT Spec • Executive Coupe Styling • Excellent MPG - Key Features Include: - • GT specification - • Leather interior - • Heated front seats - • Touchscreen infotainment system - • Satellite navigation - • Bluetooth and media connectivity - • Cruise control - • Dual-zone climate control - • Front and rear parking sensors - • Alloy wheels - • Multifunction steering wheel - • Electric windows and mirrors - • ISOFIX - • LED daytime running lights - Drives beautifully — smooth, refined, and comfortable. No warning lights or mechanical issues. - • Recently serviced and inspected - • MOT expires 03/11/2026 - ✅ Drive away today – reserve VN64 AOV with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). - 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. - ⸻ - Why Buy from AW Trade Centre? - We provide: - • Full mechanical inspection - • Free comprehensive warranty - • HPI clear vehicles (unless otherwise stated) - • Fresh valet inside and out - • Friendly, honest, and pressure-free service - 📞 Call or message us today to arrange a viewing or reserve this Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI GT.

Car.MetaTag: Ford Kuga 2.0 TDCi Titanium X AWD Euro 5 5dr Diesel Manual White
Car.Description: - Available now is this well-presented and high-spec 2013 Ford Kuga 2.0 TDCi Titanium X AWD, a spacious and capable SUV offering strong performance, excellent comfort, and great practicality. - Powered by the reliable 2.0 TDCi diesel engine paired with All-Wheel Drive, it delivers confident handling in all conditions while maintaining excellent fuel economy — perfect for family use, commuting, or long-distance driving. - This example benefits from full service history, showing it has been well maintained throughout its life. - ✅ Titanium X Spec • AWD • Full Service History - Key Features Include: - • Full panoramic sunroof - • Reverse camera - • Driver’s electric seat - • Sony infotainment system - • Full leather interior - • Heated front seats - • Satellite navigation - • Bluetooth and media connectivity - • Cruise control - • Dual-zone climate control - • Front and rear parking sensors - • Power folding door mirrors - • Alloy wheels - • Multifunction steering wheel - • Electric windows and mirrors - • ISOFIX - • Daytime running lights - Drives superb — smooth, powerful, and comfortable. No warning lights or mechanical issues. - • Recently serviced and inspected - • MOT expires 09/03/2027 - ✅ Drive away today – reserve YC13 VFZ with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). - 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. - ⸻ - Why Buy from AW Trade Centre? - We provide: - • Full mechanical inspection - • Free comprehensive warranty - • HPI clear vehicles (unless otherwise stated) - • Fresh valet inside and out - • Friendly, honest, and pressure-free service - 📞 Call or message us today to arrange a viewing or reserve this Ford Kuga 2.0 TDCi Titanium X AWD.

Car.Description: ⚠️ SPARES OR REPAIRS / PART EXCHANGE TO CLEAR ⚠️ This vehicle has been taken in part exchange and is being listed as a trade sale due to its age and mileage. It is sold as seen, without warranty or guarantees. Buyers are welcome to inspect and test drive prior to purchase. ⸻ Available now is this 2010 (60) Audi A4 2.0 TDIe Technik, a premium saloon offering excellent fuel economy, refined comfort, and Audi’s renowned build quality. Powered by the efficient 2.0 TDIe diesel engine, it delivers strong MPG and smooth motorway cruising. ✅ £35 road tax • TDI Efficiency • Great MPG Key Features Include: • Technik specification • Satellite navigation system • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Cruise control • Dual-zone climate control • Alloy wheels • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • Full leather seats • Heated seats • Daytime running lights Starts and drives (unless you want to specify faults). • MOT status to be confirmed 💷 Priced to clear – no offers, no warranty. 🚗 Drive away today – first to view will buy. ⸻ 📞 Call or message to arrange viewing.

Car.MetaTag: Volkswagen Polo 1.2 TDI Match Edition Euro 5 5dr Diesel Manual White
Car.Description: Available now is this clean and economical Volkswagen Polo 1.2 TDI — a reliable and efficient hatchback offering low running costs, solid build quality, and a smooth everyday driving experience. Will come with 6 months warranty. ✅ Excellent fuel economy ✅ Cheap to tax and insure ✅ Ideal first car or daily runaround ✅ Starts and drives spot on ✅ Smooth gearbox and clutch ✅ Well maintained example Key Features • Comfortable cloth interior • Air conditioning • Electric windows • Electric mirrors • CD/Radio system • AUX connectivity • ISOFIX • Central locking • Power steering Driving Experience: Drives exactly as it should — smooth, economical, and easy to handle. Engine pulls well, gearbox is responsive, and the car is comfortable both in town and on longer journeys. No warning lights or mechanical issues. A dependable and practical car that’s ready to go. Condition Clean example for its age. Bodywork is tidy with only minor age-related marks, and the interior has been well kept. Purchase Options ✅ Drive away today 💳 Reserve with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply) 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates Why Buy from AW Trade Centre? • Full mechanical inspection • Free comprehensive warranty • HPI clear vehicles (unless stated) • Fresh valet inside and out • Friendly, honest, no-pressure service 📞 Call or message now to arrange a viewing or secure this Volkswagen Polo 1.2 TDI 🚗

Car.MetaTag: Vauxhall Corsa 1.4i ecoFLEX Energy Euro 6 5dr (a/c) Petrol Manual Black
Car.Description: Available now is this well-presented and economical 2016 (66) Vauxhall Corsa 1.4i ecoFLEX Energy, a practical hatchback offering low running costs, great comfort, and excellent everyday usability. Powered by the reliable 1.4 petrol ecoFLEX engine, it’s smooth, efficient, and ULEZ compliant, making it ideal for new drivers, commuting, or city driving. This example also benefits from having the timing chain recently replaced, giving added peace of mind for the next owner. ✅ ULEZ compliant • Low insurance • Cheap to run ✅ Timing chain replaced Key Features Include: • Apple CarPlay • Android Auto • Touchscreen infotainment system • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Cruise control • Air conditioning • Heated seats (Energy trim feature) • Heated steering wheel • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • Alloy wheels • ISOFIX • Daytime running lights Drives great — smooth, quiet, and economical. No warning lights or mechanical issues. • Recently serviced and inspected • MOT expires 30/01/2027 ✅ Drive away today – reserve VO66 UAE with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. ⸻ Why Buy from AW Trade Centre? We provide: • Full mechanical inspection • Free comprehensive warranty • HPI clear vehicles (unless otherwise stated) • Fresh valet inside and out • Friendly, honest, and pressure-free service 📞 Call or message us today to arrange a viewing or reserve this Vauxhall Corsa 1.4 ecoFLEX Energy.
